items.md: IT Consultant & ICT Infrastructure Specialist with strong expertise in Data Center Design, Implementation & O&M, Smart City/SAFE City Systems, ICCC Operations, and ITMS/ATMS/ELV/CCTV integration. Proven experience delivering large-scale tech projects across Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh Smart City Programs and leading engagements with KPMG India, aligned with high-demand Smart City and ICT leadership roles requiring IoT, surveillance, and urban tech integration. Adept at SLA-driven service delivery, vendor/OEM management, quality & compliance, and leading cross-functional technical teams, matching the core expectations of ICT/Smart City/Data Center Service Delivery Manager roles in current market demand. Seeking to drive scalable innovations across Data Center Infrastructure, ICCC operations, and Smart/SAFE City digital ecosystems ..

items.html:
08/2025 - Current Assisting MP police for their exiting and futuristic project i.e. Safe city and police station CCTV
Lead design & implementation of Data Center infrastructure of State Data Center, including compute, storage, networking, virtualization, and disaster recovery, Cooling and Electrical Infrastructure systems
Architect ICT/ELV solutions for Smart City, SAFE City, ICCC, ITS, and surveillance ecosystems of MP state Governments
Ensured alignment of project deliverables with MeitY guidelines, e-Governance standards, cybersecurity policies, and national digital frameworks.
Contributed to bid process management, including preparation of RFPs, BOQ , DPR, evaluation of technical bids, vendor assessment, and compliance verification.
Translate functional and operational requirements into technical specifications, solution architectures, and implementation roadmaps—consistent with industry expectations of converting client goals into technical requirements
Draft all supporting documentation: SRS, functional specs, design documents, SOPs, audit checklists, and compliance reports
Preparing Project for SAFEGAURD CITY project for MP Police Conduct baseline assessments, feasibility studies, business requirement workshops, and system audits to understand client needs—aligning with standard IT consultant responsibilities of analyzing requirements and designing IT solutions
SLA, Security, Audit activities of MSI as per RFP, supporting for the daily Reports, Billing and Payments, SLA Measurement, Solutioning of network, CCTV Surveillance and all the related components, Review of Project execution, Go-Live and O&M. Also supporting in various Draft RFP, DPR and Prebid queries and meetings. Supporting in sizing, costing and procurement.
Coordinate with OEMs, system integrators, state IT departments, and Smart City SPVs throughout the project lifecycle.
Conduct FAT (Factory Acceptance Testing), UAT (User Acceptance Testing), SIT (System Integration Testing) with government stakeholders to confirm that deployed systems meet functional and operational expectations.
Oversee end-to-end Go-Live activities including system cutover, data migration, configuration validation, and final readiness checks.
Ensure successful handover to O&M teams with training, documentation, and stabilization support
Ensure alignment with government standards, cybersecurity guidelines, and ITIL-based O&M processes.

items.md:
* Managed a large cross-functional workforce of **100+ IT Technical Team , field, and operations engineers** across **Bikaner Zone**, overseeing **ICCC, Smart City operations**, and **Dial-100 / 112 / 1930 (Cyber Fraud)** emergency response systems.
* Ensured **maximum uptime** of the complete **Data Center, IT infrastructure, ICCC, surveillance systems, ITMS, emergency response, forensic lab**, and command-center applications—maintaining strict **SLA compliance** and service quality
* Led Tier-2 & 3 Data Center operations & Maintenance consisting of servers, enterprise storage, network switches, database servers, smart racks, and power panel systems
* Designed and reviewed **ICT & IT infrastructure solutions**, including network topologies, server architectures, cloud readiness, security frameworks, and Smart City integrations.
* **IT Technical Consultant** for **parallel ICT projects**, providing end-to-end technical guidance, architectural design, and solution engineering.
* Supervised all ICCC operational activities including real-time monitoring, response escalation, coordination with police/departments, and analytics-driven decision support.
* Engaged multiple **State and Central Government bodies** for approvals, technical audits, reviews, and compliance inspections throughout the project lifecycle
* Co-ordination with different stakeholders, i.e., Electrical department, public health department, engineering department, and Protech (system integrator to design and implement the command-and-control center).
* Command Control Centre: Designing a Command-and-Control Centre.
* Managed robust power continuity using **DG, UPS, and AMF panel** configurations, ensuring uninterrupted Data Center availability.
* Oversaw **PSAP operations using HEXAGON CAD & GIS, AVAYA EPABX**, citywide video surveillance monitoring, and emergency call-center workflows..
* Activity performed from the Command-and-Control Centre.
* Oversaw **Fire Alarm, Access Control, Biometrics, WLD**, rodent repellent, and environmental monitoring systems within the ICCC and Data Center ecosystem.
* Conducted **technical assessments, gap analysis, feasibility studies, and drafted technical proposals**, architecture diagrams, and solution design documents

* Schedule assignments, monitor, review, and report project status regularly to manage project risks, P&L, and ensure successful project delivery and implementation, quality control, team building, and new requirements.
* Contributing to strategies and execution roadmaps (for purchases, strict budget controls, IT infrastructure, security, crisis/disaster and business continuity plans, asset management, incident management, audits, compliance and regulations, and vendor management).

* Prepared and reviewed **technical standards, specifications, and solution frameworks** aligned with the latest industry practices in **Security Automation Project , ATMS, and Intelligent Traffic Management ,CCTV, Access Control, Vehicle management Project Technologies**

02/2014 - 03/2023 Manage multiple simultaneous projects for enterprise clients (Vedanta, Birla, ITC, JPL, Adani, etc.) covering IT infrastructure upgrades, CCTV rollouts, automation systems, and control-room deployments.
EMPTY Prepare project charters, execution plans, risk matrices, timelines, resource plans, and stakeholder updates in line with enterprise PMO standards.
EMPTY Lead end-to-end implementation and lifecycle management of enterprise CCTV systems, including camera design, layout planning, bandwidth sizing, storage planning, and smart surveillance integration
EMPTY Manage deployment, configuration & optimization of VMS platforms such as Milestone, Genetec, Bosch, Honeywell, and integrate with video analytics modules (ANPR, face recognition, intrusion detection, perimeter analytics, object tracking)
EMPTY Conduct FAT, SAT, UAT, and Go-Live validation for CCTV and security systems, ensuring compliance with organizational and industry standards.
EMPTY Oversee deployment and integration of Access Control Systems, including biometric, RFID, smart card, turnstiles, boom barriers, and enterprise access-control software.
EMPTY Design and manage Plant Automation and Industrial OT systems such as fire alarm, gas-detection sensors, SCADA-integrated safety systems, WLD, BMS, and facility automation
EMPTY Implement Vehicle Management Systems (VMS) including ANPR gates, RFID-based vehicle tracking, parking management, weighbridge automation, and entry-exit flow optimization
EMPTY Ensure integration between CCTV, ACS, Vehicle Management, and industrial automation platforms
EMPTY Design and manage IT networking architecture, including L2/L3 switching, routing, VLAN segmentation, firewall policies, and network security controls
EMPTY Lead rack re-organization, upgradation, cable management, smart rack planning, and data center physical infrastructure improvements
EMPTY Drive end-to-end Data Center design, covering servers, storage, virtualization, backups, power systems (UPS, DG), cooling, AMC planning, and periodic audits.
EMPTY Maintain documentation of network diagrams, DC layouts, rack elevations, IP schemas, and system integration points.
EMPTY Prepare complete BOQ for CCTV, networking, access control, plant automation, data center equipment, and IT infrastructure components.
EMPTY Evaluate vendor proposals, review technical compliance, perform solution benchmarking, and recommend cost-optimized and scalable solutions
EMPTY Lead material ordering, procurement planning, GRN, asset tagging, and inventory lifecycle management.
EMPTY Conduct site surveys, feasibility studies, technical assessments, and prepare solution proposals for new and brownfield infrastructure projects
EMPTY Develop integration strategies for CCTV, Access Control, Security Systems, VMS, Vehicle Automation, and IT infrastructure with enterprise platforms.
EMPTY Ensure adherence to compliance standards, cybersecurity policies, business continuity strategies, and audit requirements.
items.md:
| 02/2014 - 03/2023 | Manage multiple simultaneous projects for enterprise clients (**Vedanta, Birla, ITC, JPL, Adani, etc.**) covering IT infrastructure upgrades, CCTV rollouts, automation systems, and control-room deployments.                                    |
| ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| EMPTY             | Prepare **project charters, execution plans, risk matrices, timelines, resource plans**, and stakeholder updates in line with enterprise PMO standards.                                                                                           |
| EMPTY             | Lead end-to-end implementation and lifecycle management of **enterprise CCTV systems**, including camera design, layout planning, bandwidth sizing, storage planning, and smart surveillance integration                                          |
| EMPTY             | Manage deployment, configuration & optimization of **VMS platforms** such as Milestone, Genetec, Bosch, Honeywell, and integrate with video analytics modules (ANPR, face recognition, intrusion detection, perimeter analytics, object tracking) |
| EMPTY             | Conduct **FAT, SAT, UAT**, and Go-Live validation for CCTV and security systems, ensuring compliance with organizational and industry standards.                                                                                                  |
| EMPTY             | Oversee deployment and integration of **Access Control Systems**, including **biometric, RFID, smart card, turnstiles, boom barriers**, and enterprise access-control software.                                                                   |
| EMPTY             | Design and manage **Plant Automation and Industrial OT systems** such as fire alarm, gas-detection sensors, SCADA-integrated safety systems, WLD, BMS, and facility automation                                                                    |
| EMPTY             | Implement **Vehicle Management Systems (VMS)** including ANPR gates, RFID-based vehicle tracking, parking management, weighbridge automation, and entry-exit flow optimization                                                                    |
| EMPTY             | Ensure integration between **CCTV, ACS, Vehicle Management, and industrial automation platforms**                                                                                                                                                 |
| EMPTY             | Design and manage IT networking architecture, including **L2/L3 switching, routing, VLAN segmentation, firewall policies**, and network security controls                                                                                         |
| EMPTY             | Lead **rack re-organization, upgradation, cable management**, smart rack planning, and data center physical infrastructure improvements                                                                                                           |
| EMPTY             | Drive end-to-end **Data Center design**, covering servers, storage, virtualization, backups, power systems (UPS, DG), cooling, AMC planning, and periodic audits.                                                                                 |
| EMPTY             | Maintain documentation of **network diagrams, DC layouts, rack elevations, IP schemas**, and system integration points.                                                                                                                           |
| EMPTY             | Prepare complete **BOQ** for CCTV, networking, access control, plant automation, data center equipment, and IT infrastructure components.                                                                                                         |
| EMPTY             | Evaluate vendor proposals, review technical compliance, perform solution benchmarking, and recommend cost-optimized and scalable solutions                                                                                                        |
| EMPTY             | Lead **material ordering, procurement planning, GRN, asset tagging**, and inventory lifecycle management.                                                                                                                                         |
| EMPTY             | Conduct **site surveys, feasibility studies, technical assessments**, and prepare solution proposals for new and brownfield infrastructure projects                                                                                               |
| EMPTY             | Develop integration strategies for CCTV, Access Control, Security Systems, VMS, Vehicle Automation, and IT infrastructure with enterprise platforms.                                                                                              |
| EMPTY             | Ensure adherence to compliance standards, cybersecurity policies, business continuity strategies, and audit requirements.                                                                                                                         |

![Suraj Barhath profile picture](page_1_image_1_v2.jpg) # Suraj Barhath (Prince2®) IT Consultant & ICT Infrastructure Specialist with strong expertise in Data Center Design, Implementation & O&M, Smart City/SAFE City Systems, ICCC Operations, and ITMS/ATMS/ELV/CCTV integration. Proven experience delivering large-scale tech projects across Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh Smart City Programs and leading engagements with KPMG India, aligned with high-demand Smart City and ICT leadership roles requiring IoT, surveillance, and urban tech integration. Adept at SLA-driven service delivery, vendor/OEM management, quality & compliance, and leading cross-functional technical teams, matching the core expectations of ICT/Smart City/Data Center Service Delivery Manager roles in current market demand. Seeking to drive scalable innovations across Data Center Infrastructure, ICCC operations, and Smart/SAFE City digital ecosystems .. ## CONTACT ![Location icon](page_1_image_2_v2.jpg) Ajmer(Rajasthan), India 305802 ![Phone icon](page_1_image_3_v2.jpg) 8003624634 ![Email icon](page_1_image_4_v2.jpg) barhathsuraj@gmail.com ## SKILLS * Project management * System integration * Vendor management * Quality control * Technical documentation * Process improvement * Compliance auditing * Leadership proficiency ## CERTIFICATIONS * Prince2 Foundation * Data Center Design ## EDUCATION ### B. Tech (ECE) Rajasthan Technical University - Kota (2014) **GPA**: 65% ### PGDMM (Post Graduation Diploma in Marketing Management ) Ignou-Delhi-2020 ## PERSONAL INFORMATION **Date of birth**: 1992-11-03 ## Experience ### Consultant ### KPMG India
08/2025 - Current Assisting MP police for their exiting and futuristic project i.e. Safe city and police station CCTV
Lead design & implementation of Data Center infrastructure of State Data Center, including compute, storage, networking, virtualization, and disaster recovery, Cooling and Electrical Infrastructure systems

Ensured alignment of project deliverables with MeitY guidelines, e-Governance standards, cybersecurity policies, and national digital frameworks.

Translate functional and operational requirements into technical specifications, solution architectures, and implementation roadmaps—consistent with industry expectations of converting client goals into technical requirements
Draft all supporting documentation: SRS, functional specs, design documents, SOPs, audit checklists, and compliance reports

SLA, Security, Audit activities of MSI as per RFP, supporting for the daily Reports, Billing and Payments, SLA Measurement, Solutioning of network, CCTV Surveillance and all the related components, Review of Project execution, Go-Live and O&M. Also supporting in various Draft RFP, DPR and Prebid queries and meetings. Supporting in sizing, costing and procurement.
Coordinate with OEMs, system integrators, state IT departments, and Smart City SPVs throughout the project lifecycle.
Conduct FAT (Factory Acceptance Testing), UAT (User Acceptance Testing), SIT (System Integration Testing) with government stakeholders to confirm that deployed systems meet functional and operational expectations.
Oversee end-to-end Go-Live activities including system cutover, data migration, configuration validation, and final readiness checks.
Ensure successful handover to O&M teams with training, documentation, and stabilization support
Ensure alignment with government standards, cybersecurity guidelines, and ITIL-based O&M processes.
